input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8231 [Automation] java run fails for org.specs2:specs2-core_3:5.5.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Optional specs2 integrations such as specs2-junit, specs2-scalacheck, specs2-cats, specs2-scalaz, specs2-html, and specs2-form require separate modules if the generated tests choose to exercise those features, but they are not needed for core coverage.
The reported failure appears to be test/API drift around specs2 5.5.0 rather than missing setup; Gradle and Native Image verification remain authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: specs2-core_3 is an in-process Scala testing framework module; its 5.5.0 POM brings the required specs2 matcher/common/fp, Scala 3 library, portable-scala-reflect, and sbt test-interface dependencies transitively, and normal meaningful coverage is reachable without Docker, external services, or required environment/system properties.
